title: ramium elongatum
intro: Ramium elongatum, also known as Eclipta alba, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is commonly found in wetlands and fields. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and psoriasis, as well as promoting hair growth and strengthening the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
